error_signature: Connection Lost - You have a connection issue or the server is down
title: Connection Lost error with Apache reverse proxy
symptom: Users experience a 'Connection Lost' message indicating a connection issue or server downtime when using n8n through an Apache reverse proxy.
applies_when: Using n8n with Apache as a reverse proxy
not_this_if: Using n8n without a reverse proxy
root_cause: The Apache configuration may not properly handle WebSocket connections, which are essential for real-time updates in n8n. Without the correct proxy settings for WebSockets, the connection can drop, leading to the 'Connection Lost' error.
fix_steps: Update the Apache configuration to include WebSocket handling using RewriteEngine.
Add the necessary ProxyPass and ProxyPassReverse directives for WebSocket connections.
Enable required Apache modules with 'sudo a2enmod rewrite proxy proxy_http proxy_wstunnel ssl headers'.
Test the configuration with 'sudo apache2ctl configtest' and restart Apache with 'sudo systemctl restart apache2'.
agent_instruction: Modify the Apache configuration to properly handle WebSocket connections and restart the server.
